summarization.a: The line chart displays intensity values against angles measured in degrees for an XRD measurement.

a.question: What type of symmetry is visible in this graph?
a.answer: a	angular symmetry. Possitive and negative angles give the same intensity

a.question: What is a material property that can be analyzed with XRD?
What is the intensity value at 0 degrees?
What is the maximum measurement range in degrees for XRD?
a.answer: a	From -180 to 180 degrees. Any more would not result in different data as the angles will have radial symmetry
